reviews.text: If you’re looking for an affordable, durable, and practical luggage set, this is a solid choice. It may not be luxury-level, but for regular travel, it does the job really well and feels reliable.
Product quality, design, colour , Zipper quality and appearance all are good. Durable and Valuable for money.
Good.. value for money
Is lightweight,good price but could have been a little better quality ,good size for long journey travelling
Only brand name , low quality product
Worth for money. Looks good.
Material is good . Quality is impressive. Easy to carry
Great product and timely delivery, good value for money.👍

The bag quality is really good and feels sturdy. The outer shell is strong, the design looks premium, and the wheels move smoothly overall. Size and storage are perfect for travel, and the finish is neat and classy.  The only reason for giving 4 stars instead of 5 is that there are minor scratches on the wheels, likely due to handling or drop point during delivery. It doesn’t affect functionality at all, but worth mentioning.  Overall, a great product at this price, durable and worth buying. Highly recommended for frequent travellers.
Wow product .. safari have a quality.. .. value for money. Thank u amazon ..
Value for money.
Quality of product is good however i am not satisfied with the wheel quality and handle is also not strong enough

I have 4 year old 2 AT bags, the chain of which is still very smooth and perfectly working. On contrary safari chain has poor quality. Plastic body easily got scratched. Size is good so fits more stuffs that AT in same size category.
I’ve got the trolley for 1700, and it’s a great deal to have the trolley in the vanity. Great stutdy suitcase.
So far it was good. But on my recent trip to tirupati the lock didn't open i had to try some youtube hack and open it.

Too good ! Sturdy ! And truly durable.. it's been years since I bought this and It's still going good, I have used it for all sorts of travel, airways, railways, travels etc but still I never found it out to be damaged by anything. Just scratches on body but that can be prevented if you use cover, I did not so the scratches were obvious but over all worth the money. Go for it !!

Writing review after 1 year of purchase  Positives: - good quality - Good color - good space - good for cabin bags - wheels are nice - rolls nicely - light weight - handle quality is good but design and switch is not  Negatives: - expensive for its design and quality - not balanced properly(design is flawed) - fell down easily - handle and extended handle is not sturdy - extended handle causes problem(started after 2 months) - handle switch is not of good quality  For this price, I would expect something better. This Safari Persia 77 cm suitcase has been a delight on my recent trips:  ✨ Key Highlights  Premium look & durable shell: The textured polycarbonate exterior in Pearl Blue not only looks elegant but also withstands scratches and rough handling long-term utw11297.utweb.utexas.edu +8 ubuy.sc +8 amazon.in +8 safaribags.com +15 amazon.sa +15 u-buy.com.ng +15 .  Smooth 8‑wheel spinner system: Glides effortlessly in all directions; even through busy airports, it remains stable and easy to push safaribags.com +8 amazon.ae +8 hindustantimes.com +8 .  Spacious & travel‑ready: With dimensions around 77×55×32 cm, it meets most check‑in size rules and holds enough for 5–7 days of packing amazon.ae +4 u-buy.com.ng +4 ubuy.sc +4 .  Secure combination lock: Built-in lock adds peace of mind when traveling, no need for extra accessories safaribags.com +15 amazon.ae +15 ubuy.com.pk +15 .  👍 What I Loved  Eye‑catching Pearl Blue color that’s subtle yet stands out on the conveyor.  Lightweight enough to lift into trunks or overheads despite its large size.  Great value for money compared to similarly featured luggage.  ⚠️ A Few Drawbacks  A reviewer noted that wheels, while smooth, aren't fully scratch‑proof safaribags.com +12 amazon.sa +12 ubuy.mw +12 flipkart.com +9 amazon.in +9 amazon.ae +9 .  Packaging on delivery could be improved; mine wasn't wrapped very securely, though the suitcase was unharmed .  No expandable section – pack mindfully if you tend to bring back more than you take.  🧳 Final Verdict If you're after a stylish, spacious, and sturdy check‑in suitcase that rolls smoothly and looks great, the Safari Persia 77 cm spinner is a strong choice. It’s perfect for family vacations or week‑long trips. Just be sure to unpack carefully upon delivery, and consider using protective wheel care over time.  Read more
It says 77cm but it’s not. It’s only 72cm. This is not a large suitcase, it’s medium.

The 8 wheel system rolls incredibly smoothly, even across uneven airport surfaces. The sturdy hard-shell build feels high-quality, and the vibrant green shade is easy to spot. It’s roomy yet light, and the zippers open and close effortlessly. Perfect for anyone who travels often.

The product is good, but a pc thickness is low.. value for money, but cant be exceeding 25kgs, ideal for below 20kg for the bigger one, 12-14kgs for the medium & 8-10kgs for the smaller one. Colour, Look n feel is premium. Good deal under 10k for the set of 3…
Colour so classic. The quality of the weels and the zip is so good. The size is as mentioned and correct. Over all its a best product

I bought this Safari large trolley bag from Amazon in June 2025, and within less than a year of normal use, the outer polycarbonate shell cracked near the wheel area.  The product description mentions an “unbreakable polycarbonate shell,” but my experience was completely different. The damage happened during regular travel, without any extreme mishandling.  The crack is serious enough to affect the structure and usability of the bag. For a brand that promotes durability and strength, this is disappointing.  I would suggest the company be more realistic in their claims. If you’re buying this expecting long-term durability, please be cautious.  Overall, not worth the price considering the quality.

Very good product quality is top notch. As brand there are minute things which they have provided in this trolly which is actually helpul. First of all there is two pockets in the partion flat to keep wet things or toiletries which helps to discard the use of separate toiletrie pouch. 2nd things compression straps are present on both the compartments which is very good. Many budget trolly or even upto 3k trolly bags provide compression strap to only one compartment but in this case it is present on both sides which keeps the things in its place. Recommended to all.

Perfect Fit & Design: Fits my top load washing machine perfectly — snug and secure without being too tight. The zipper openings make it easy to use the lid without removing the cover. ✅ High-Quality Material: Made of durable, thick fabric that feels premium. It’s waterproof and dustproof — ideal for protecting the machine from rain, dust, sun, and pollution. ✅ Easy to Clean: Just wipe with a damp cloth — no special care needed! ✅ Looks Great: The sleek and modern design blends well with my laundry area. ✅ Value for Money: Excellent quality at this price range — definitely worth it.

I’ve used this kitbag for two trips so far.  👍🏼👍🏼 2 decent side pockets and two smaller front pockets for things you need to access quickly. Seems fairly durable. Perfect for cabin baggage.  😬😬 The main compartment zipper is in the centre. This is not as good as a u-shaped zip line that opens the top like a flap and makes it easier to pack and unpack your things. I used it to carry a small printer. But getting that printer in was a bit of a pain. The long strap has no padding, so if it’s slightly heavier it might be less comfortable to keep on your shoulder.

Great product to choose. Easily pack your belonging from 7-10 days easily. Good quality stiching is used. Easy to carry. No pain on the shoulders when carrying. Look wise good. Such a pathetic product. I seriously considered taking action against Amazon and Skybags for selling something this substandard and wasting my time. From a reputed brand and a platform of that scale, I expected at least basic quality, not this kind of negligence.  The product arrived with 2 holes in it, completely unacceptable. This clearly shows a lack of proper quality checks before dispatch. If this is the standard they are maintaining, it’s disappointing and unacceptable.  I returned it immediately. The only saving grace was the quick refund process, which was handled well. But that does not excuse the poor product quality in the first place.

⭐ From the very first touch, the premium polyester fabric feels tough, durable, and ready to handle the chaos of real-life travel—bus rides, train journeys, airport conveyors, and even rough car trunks. The royal blue color is vibrant yet classy, making it look sporty without screaming for attention.  With dimensions of 25 x 46 x 25 cm, this duffle is perfectly sized for carry-on use, gym sessions, short trips, or overnight stays. Don’t let the compact look fool you—it swallows clothes like a champ. You can easily fit: • 2–3 days of clothing • Footwear or toiletries • Towels, gym gear, or travel essentials  The spacious main compartment is well-stitched and thoughtfully designed, while the strong zipper glides smoothly and feels reliable even when the bag is fully loaded. No stuck zips. No cheap rattling. Just solid performance.  Comfort is another big win. The sturdy carry handles sit comfortably in hand, and the adjustable shoulder strap distributes weight evenly, making it easy to carry even during long walks or station hopping.  What truly makes this bag shine is its versatility. It works effortlessly as: • A carry-on travel bag • A gym or sports duffle • A weekend getaway bag • An office-to-gym transition bag  And of course, being a Skybags product, you get that extra assurance of trusted brand quality, excellent stitching, and long-lasting performance.  ⸻  ✅ Pros at a Glance  ✔ Lightweight yet durable ✔ Perfect carry-on size ✔ Stylish blue sporty design ✔ Smooth, strong zippers ✔ Excellent value for money  ⸻  🌟 Final Verdict  The Skybags Polyester Active Nxt Duffle Carry-On (46 cm) is a power-packed, no-nonsense bag that delivers comfort, durability, and style in one neat package. Whether you’re traveling, hitting the gym, or planning a quick weekend escape, this duffle has your back—literally and figuratively.  Highly recommended for smart travelers who want maximum utility without extra bulk! 💙✈️  Read more
Good product
This bag is so versatile. It can be a gym bag or an overnight bag. It holds a lot of stuff. It is sturdy and is going strong even after 3 years !!

The Skybags Cardiff Polyester 63.5 cms Red Travel Duffle (DFTCAR62ERED) is a great blend of style, durability, and practicality, making it an excellent choice for both short trips and extended travel.  Design & Build Quality: The first thing that stands out is its vibrant red color, which gives it a bold and modern look. Made from high-quality polyester, the bag feels sturdy and durable, capable of handling regular use without wear and tear. The stitching is strong, and the zippers glide smoothly, adding to the overall premium feel.  Storage & Capacity: With a size of 63.5 cm, this duffle offers ample space for clothes, shoes, and travel essentials. It easily accommodates packing for a 3–5 day trip. The main compartment is spacious, and additional pockets help keep smaller items organized.  Portability & Comfort: The bag comes with both carry handles and an adjustable shoulder strap, providing flexibility in carrying. Even when fully packed, it remains relatively comfortable to carry. The lightweight design is an added advantage for travelers who want to avoid extra bulk.  Durability: Skybags has done a good job ensuring the material can withstand rough handling during travel. Whether you’re using it for road trips, gym sessions, or short vacations, it holds up well over time.  Pros: • Eye-catching and stylish design • Spacious interior with good organization • Durable polyester material • Lightweight and easy to carry • Smooth and reliable zippers  Cons: • Lacks trolley wheels (not ideal for heavy packing) • Limited external compartments  Final Verdict: The Skybags Cardiff Red Travel Duffle is a dependable and stylish option for travelers looking for a spacious yet lightweight bag. It offers great value for money and is especially suitable for short trips, gym use, or weekend getaways.  Rating: 4.5/5  Read more

I recently purchased the American Tourister Ivy 78 Cms Large Check-in Polypropylene (PP) trolley, and I must say that I am thoroughly disappointed with its performance. Despite its promising features, this suitcase failed to meet my expectations in several key areas.  First and foremost, the build quality of this trolley is subpar. The polypropylene material used feels cheap and flimsy, making me question its durability. Within just a few uses, I noticed visible scratches and scuff marks on the surface, which is unacceptable for a product that is meant to endure the rigors of travel.  Furthermore, the wheels on this trolley are a major letdown. They lack smoothness and maneuverability, making it a struggle to navigate through crowded airports or uneven surfaces. The wheels frequently jammed and became stiff, adding unnecessary frustration to my travel experience. I expected better performance from a reputable brand like American Tourister.  Additionally, the handle mechanism was poorly designed. It felt flimsy and had a noticeable wobble, which made it uncomfortable to pull the trolley. I had concerns about its longevity and worried that it might break during my travels. A reliable handle is essential for a check-in suitcase, and the American Tourister Ivy failed to deliver in this aspect.  Lastly, the overall aesthetics of the trolley were uninspiring. The design lacked innovation and appeared outdated. For the price I paid, I expected a more stylish and modern look. It is disappointing when a product not only underperforms in terms of functionality but also fails to make a positive impression visually.  In conclusion, the American Tourister Ivy 78 Cms Large Check-in Polypropylene (PP) trolley fell short of my expectations. Its poor build quality, subpar wheels, flimsy handle, and unappealing aesthetics make it difficult for me to recommend this product. I regret my purchase and would advise potential buyers to explore other options before settling for this particular suitcase  Read more

The packaging was also just average, nothing special.

I bought this suitcase expecting it to last at least a few international trips, but the quality is unbelievably disappointing. After just one trip, the entire corner near the wheel cracked open, and the wheel base is now unstable. The shell has literally split, making the bag unsafe and unusable.  I handled the luggage normally—nothing rough or unusual—and still this happened. For any travel product, durability is the bare minimum, and this bag failed instantly.  What went wrong: • The side of the bag developed a deep crack straight from the wheel mount. • The plastic body feels cheap and brittle. • A trolley that can’t survive even one trip is not travel-ready at all.  This is not acceptable quality for any price. I would not recommend this suitcase to anyone. If you’re considering buying it, please avoid it—there are far better options that won’t leave you stranded with a broken bag on your first journey  Can not claim the warranty as well .  Read more

This was my first purchase from this brand on Amazon, and honestly, I’m not convinced about the quality. I’ve attached a video for reference.  Earlier, I had purchased an Amazon Basics trolley set, which was much cheaper, yet the quality was excellent. That truly felt like a value-for-money product—unlike this one.

I strongly advise against purchasing this suitcase. I was incredibly disappointed from the moment I took it out of the box. First, the product description is misleading. The photos advertise a crisp, white suitcase, but the actual product is a dull off-white color. Worse than the color mismatch is the appalling lack of quality control. The suitcase arrived looking damaged and hastily thrown together. Here is exactly what I found right out of the packaging: • Scuff marks and dirt in multiple spots across the exterior shell. • Terrible finishing around the zipper: The ends are very badly glued, and the rubber sealing is already separating and peeling off. • Visible debris: Bizarrely, there is literally a piece of masking tape and loose threads visibly sticking out from under the rubber trim. The only reason I am not returning this immediately is because I have an urgent trip and simply do not have the time to wait for a replacement. I am completely stuck with a damaged, poorly manufactured product. Do yourself a favor and spend your money elsewhere. The quality is completely unacceptable, and it looks nothing like the item advertised. Avoid this product!  Read more

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Stylish, Durable & Worth the Money (Delivery Slightly Delayed) I recently purchased this 3-piece trolley bag set from Aristocrat, and overall I’m really impressed with the quality and design. First of all, the color combination (olive green with yellow accents) looks very premium and unique—definitely stands out from regular luggage. The hard shell body feels sturdy and durable, which gives confidence for long trips and rough handling during travel. The 360° spinner wheels are super smooth, making it very easy to move the bags around even when fully loaded. The trolley handles are strong and adjustable, and the zippers feel high-quality as well.  All three sizes (small, medium, large) are very practical—perfect for different travel needs. Also, the bags came well-packed and in proper condition. The only small issue was that delivery was delayed by 1 day, but considering the product quality, it wasn’t a big concern. ✅ Pros: Premium look and finish Strong and durable body Smooth wheels & easy handling Value-for-money combo set Cons:1-day delivery delay Overall, I would highly recommend this set to anyone looking for stylish and reliable luggage 👍  Read more

Recently purchased this trolley Bag and I must say that it is a solid choice for travelers who seeking a lightweight yet durable option. Its hard-shell design ensures protection, while the 8 spinner wheels make maneuvering easy. The bag's compact size fits perfectly for short trips, and the combination lock adds a layer of security. Ordered cabin size bag. It is made up of Polypropylene and not of polycarbonate. Polycarbonate is a stronger material but the bags of Safari I checked were having weight of 2.5 kg and flimsy build. The bag quality is really good and feels sturdy. The outer shell is strong, the design looks premium, and the wheels move smoothly overall. Size and storage are perfect for travel, and the finish is neat and classy.  The only reason for giving 4 stars instead of 5 is that there are minor scratches on the wheels, likely due to handling or drop point during delivery. It doesn’t affect functionality at all, but worth mentioning.  Overall, a great product at this price, durable and worth buying. Highly recommended for frequent travellers.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ (5/5) I am very happy with this Aristocate Torry bag. The bag is exactly as I expected. The material feels strong and durable, and the overall build quality is excellent for the price. Overall, this is a value-for-money purchase and I would definitely recommend it.

Economical product good for travelling with medium size n weight

Very Poor Quality – Not Worth the Money  I am extremely disappointed with this Aristocrat suitcase. The inner lining quality is very inferior—it feels like thin polythene, not proper fabric. Even the separation between compartments is made of this flimsy material.  The stitching is very poor, and it is obvious that the lining can tear anytime. Once that happens, the suitcase will become unusable. This is unacceptable from a brand like Aristocrat.  A friend had warned me not to buy it, especially since the company does not show interior pictures of the suitcase. Unfortunately, I trusted the brand and went ahead with the purchase. I would have returned it, but I had already traveled abroad.  Strongly do not recommend this product. Please avoid buying it.

Just got my hands on the Aristocrat black trolley bag for ₹2900, and seriously, it's a total steal! This bag is super sturdy and has way more space than I expected. I'm really impressed with the quality for the price I paid. Definitely worth every rupee! 🛍️✈️
